title: Trace: indexing pipeline
task: I need to understand the full indexing pipeline from when a user runs `mnemex index` to when chunks are stored. Trace the execution path and list the key functions in order. Do NOT make any code changes.
output:
I now have everything needed. Here is the full execution trace:

---

## `mnemex index` Execution Path

### 1. CLI Entry (`src/cli.ts`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `switch(command) → case "index"` | `cli.ts:270` |
| 2 | `handleIndex(args)` | `cli.ts:682` |

**`handleIndex`** parses flags (`--force`, `--no-llm`, `--concurrency`, etc.), then:
- Calls `createIndexer(options)` → `Indexer` constructor
- Calls `indexer.index(force)` → `cli.ts:782`

---

### 2. Lock Acquisition (`src/core/indexer.ts`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 3 | `Indexer.index(force)` — acquires `IndexLock` via `createIndexLock().acquire()` |
| 4 | `Indexer.indexInternal(force, startTime)` — main body, called after lock |

---

### 3. Initialization (`indexer.ts:229` → `initialize()`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 5 | `parserManager.initialize()` — loads tree-sitter WASM parsers |
| 6 | `createCodeUnitExtractor()` — AST symbol extractor |
| 7 | `createFileTracker(indexDbPath)` — SQLite-backed change tracker |
| 8 | `createEmbeddingsClient({ model })` — OpenRouter/Ollama client |
| 9 | `createVectorStore(vectorStorePath).initialize()` — LanceDB store |
| 10 | `createEnricher(llmClient, embeddingsClient, vectorStore, fileTracker)` — LLM enricher (optional) |

---

### 4. File Discovery & Change Detection (`indexer.ts:365`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 11 | `this.discoverFiles()` — walks project dir, applies exclude/include patterns |
| 12 | `fileTracker.getChanges(allFiles)` — returns `{newFiles, modifiedFiles, deletedFiles}` |
| 13 | For deleted files: `vectorStore.deleteByFile()` + `fileTracker.removeFile()` |
| 14 | For modified files: `vectorStore.getChunksWithVectors()` → populate `oldChunksCache` for smart reuse |

---

### 5. Per-Batch Loop — 500 files/batch (`indexer.ts:454`)

#### Phase 1: Parse & Chunk (`indexer.ts:492`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 15 | `readFileSync(filePath)` |
| 16 | `computeFileHash(filePath)` |
| 17 | `chunkFileByPath(content, filePath, fileHash)` → `chunker.ts:712` |
| 18 | ↳ `parserManager.getLanguage(filePath)` — detect language |
| 19 | ↳ `chunkFile(source, filePath, language, fileHash)` → `chunker.ts:48` |
| 20 | ↳↳ `parserManager.parse(source, language)` — tree-sitter AST |
| 21 | ↳↳ `extractChunksAST(tree, source, language)` — AST-pure chunking |
| 22 | ↳↳ `processChildren(rootNode, ...)` — recursive node traversal, emits `ParsedChunk[]` |
| 23 | ↳↳ `createCodeChunk(parsed, filePath, language, fileHash)` — attach ID, hash, metadata |

#### Phase 2: Embed (`indexer.ts:524`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 24 | Check `oldChunksCache` by `contentHash` — reuse vector if unchanged |
| 25 | `embeddingsClient.embed(texts, onProgress)` — batch API call for new chunks only |
| 26 | Map returned `embeddings[]` back to chunks |

#### Phase 3: Store chunks (`indexer.ts:651`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 27 | `vectorStore.addChunks(chunksWithEmbeddings)` — write to LanceDB |

#### Phase 2b: Code Units (`indexer.ts:682`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 28 | `codeUnitExtractor.extractUnits(content, filePath, language, fileHash)` — fine-grained AST symbols |
| 29 | `embeddingsClient.embed(unitTexts)` — embed code units |
| 30 | `vectorStore.addCodeUnits(unitsWithEmbeddings)` — write to LanceDB |

#### Phase 4: Update Tracker (`indexer.ts:803`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 31 | `fileTracker.markIndexed(filePath, fileHash, chunkIds)` — record in SQLite |

---

### 6. Post-Batch Phases

#### Phase 4.5: Symbol Graph (`indexer.ts:1164`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 32 | `extractSymbolGraph(filesToIndex, force)` |
| 33 | ↳ `symbolExtractor.extractSymbols(content, relativePath, language)` — per file |
| 34 | ↳ `fileTracker.insertSymbols(symbols)` |
| 35 | ↳ `graphManager.buildGraph()` — computes PageRank across all symbols |

#### Phase 5: LLM Enrichment (`indexer.ts:903`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 36 | `enricher.enrichFiles(fileChunksForEnrichment, { concurrency })` |
| 37 | ↳ Generates file summaries, usage examples, etc. via LLM |
| 38 | ↳ Embeds resulting text and stores in LanceDB via `vectorStore` |

#### Phase 6: External Docs (`indexer.ts:950`)

| Step | Function |
|---|---|
| 39 | `docsFetcher.fetch()` — only if manifest files (`package.json`, etc.) changed |

---

### Summary Flow

```
handleIndex()
  └─ Indexer.index()
       ├─ IndexLock.acquire()
       └─ indexInternal()
            ├─ initialize()                         # parsers, DB, LanceDB, embeddings client
            ├─ discoverFiles()                       # file system walk
            ├─ fileTracker.getChanges()             # SQLite diff
            └─ for each batch of 500 files:
                 ├─ chunkFileByPath()               # tree-sitter parse → AST chunks
                 ├─ embeddingsClient.embed()         # vectors (with cache reuse)
                 ├─ vectorStore.addChunks()          # LanceDB write
                 ├─ codeUnitExtractor.extractUnits() # fine-grained AST symbols
                 ├─ vectorStore.addCodeUnits()       # LanceDB write
                 └─ fileTracker.markIndexed()        # SQLite write
            ├─ extractSymbolGraph()                  # PageRank symbol graph
            ├─ enricher.enrichFiles()                # LLM summaries → LanceDB
            └─ docsFetcher.fetch()                   # external docs (conditional)
```
